title: [Blue Glacier, Mountain Pass]
description: You pick your way carefully over the rocks heavily coated with ice as you push forward on your stone-bruised feet.  The snow clouds hang low over the rugged mountains, hiding the glacier tops from your view.

wayto.2520: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'northeast'
wayto.2522: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'southwest'
